name: ☆ THE ADMINISTRATOR ☆
description:
☆ the one he had come to... admire. ☆

☆ Admin enters your world! Implied relationship. ☆

☆ I selfship with a lot of characters ,, my one giant polycule is growing. Me and my fos don't often see Admin, though. He's a little distant and doesn't usually like attention, but we all love him ! Sorry if it's low quality I made this for myself. You might have to add the lore yourself! ☆
